trends.context: 歌手单依纯未经授权演唱李荣浩代表作《李白》引发热议。单依纯致歉并愿担责，李荣浩回应“不需要”赔偿。事件折射出行业版权意识淡薄、违规成本低、责任链条断裂等痼疾。文章呼吁，尊重版权不能靠“又能怎”，必须让规则跑在热搜前面。​​​​

founder_memo.best_part: The pricing surface is visible from day one.
founder_memo.biggest_risk: The business model risks looking one-off instead of compounding.
founder_memo.fastest_mvp: Ship only the first wedge: Watch trend feeds.
founder_memo.first_customer: Content platforms with moderation and rights risk
founder_memo.why_high: The pricing surface is visible from day one. The score rises when it can ship, charge, and repeat without needing heavy scale.
founder_memo.why_low: The business model risks looking one-off instead of compounding. Retention loop is weak, so monthly revenue is less certain.
top_penalties: Retention loop is weak, so monthly revenue is less certain.
improve_next: Add a recurring alert, report, or compliance loop so usage repeats monthly.
Swap one generic repo dependency for tooling that matches the active trend more directly.

ideas.name: Market Pulse Research Terminal
ideas.summary: Track retail market narratives and turn them into niche trading or business-intelligence alerts.
ideas.why_now: Finance chatter and macro headlines move fast, and solo operators need opinionated tools instead of generic news dashboards.
ideas.revenue_model: Paid newsletter, premium alerts, or analyst dashboards.

ideas.name: Viral Content Repurposer

ideas.why_now: Trend windows are short, and creators need fast production pipelines that package text, images, and pages together.
ideas.revenue_model: Subscription for content packs or done-for-you service retainers.
